title: My Little Craft
description:
A modpack made for friends at the My Little Friends server :)

It includes many fun mods that do awesome stuff!!
body:
We have many mods that improve the players experiences and that add new stuff, so the game doesn't get boring over time!

This is a modpack created for a group of friends, I'm posting it here because it's easier for everyone to install it this way. The mods were requested but the members of the group.

But anyone can use it as it's just a regular Vanilla+ modpack!
